signals.observation: The VP of Operations owns the buy and decides fast.
Security review is a rubber-stamp once the VP is in; no hidden vetoes surfaced.
Decisions are made in the Monday ops review off a single Snowflake dashboard.
The three dispatchers must change their daily flow; they are rewarded on on-time delivery.
Triage fires when a shipment exception lands in Slack.

retrieved.text: Shipment 8842 delayed at the Memphis hub due to a customs hold.
Carrier capacity in the southeast was constrained this week.

eval_set.answer: Shipment 8842 is late because of a customs hold at the Memphis hub.
